entries.text: Hello, my name is Janice, and I work as a nurse at Eminent Hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I used to work at the nursing home.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It was very rewarding to work with the elderly.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Even if I gave them a little help, it was a big help to them.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Even if I gave them a word of interest, they were very smiley and happy.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I felt much more rewarding because of that.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: One thing I was sad about was that I couldn't have enough time with them.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: One of them asked me to visit the hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: At that time, it was only for patients.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I felt more rewarding because of that.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: That's why I started hospice. When you go to the hospice, you often think
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: of patients who don't talk much.

entries.text: 편안히 맞이할 수 있는 게 저희 할 일이라고 생각을 하고요
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 그리고 정말 마지막 시간이 왔을 때 보호자들이 어떡하지?
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 이런 상황 속에서 당황하기보다는 저희가 그 시간 속에서 우리가 해드릴 수 있는 일
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 뭔지 알려드리고 또 가족들의 역할이 뭔지 알려드리면서
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 환자분이 가족분들의 사랑을 느끼고 편안함을 느끼며 돌아가실 수 있다면
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 호스피스 간호사로서 더 바랄 게 없을 것 같습니다
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.
